raw: {"weights":{"R1.1":0.7,"R1.2":1.0,"R1.3":0.7,"R1.4":0.3,"R1.5":0.7,"R1.6":0.7,"R1.7":0.3,"RX.1":1.0,"RX.2":1.0,"RX.3":1.0,"RX.4":1.0,"RX.5":1.0},"active_set":["R1.1","R1.2","R1.3","R1.5","R1.6","RX.1","RX.2","RX.3","RX.4","RX.5"],"category_focus":"R1","clarification_needed":false,"clarification_question":"","rationale":{"R1.1":"The section makes competing contribution claims about a general-purpose coordination protocol and a dataset/evaluation harness, so reviewing it centrally involves conceptual reconstruction.","R1.2":"The artifact contains an apparent contradiction between a central orchestrator and a fully decentralized peer-to-peer evaluation setup, making logical consistency load-bearing.","R1.3":"The request to review the section includes checking whether reported metrics and artifacts support claims about generalization, inspectability, and principal empirical contribution.","R1.5":"The section’s narrative arc shifts from framework contribution to benchmark contribution, so section-level organization is centrally implicated.","R1.6":"A generic section review normally includes sentence- and paragraph-level clarity, register, and concision as expected responsibilities.","RX.1":"A reviewer should disclose uncertainty where the artifact alone does not establish experimental details, prior work, or implementation facts.","RX.2":"The section includes broad claims about generalization and scientific advance, requiring overclaim avoidance.","RX.3":"The projection must stay within reviewing the section rather than executing edits, rewriting, or evaluating unrelated parts of the paper.","RX.4":"Review responsibilities include flagging claims or framing that could mislead downstream readers about safety, decentralization, or empirical scope.","RX.5":"Any review observations should be traceable to specific statements in the provided artifact."}}

rationale.R1.1: The section makes competing contribution claims about a general-purpose coordination protocol and a dataset/evaluation harness, so reviewing it centrally involves conceptual reconstruction.
rationale.R1.2: The artifact contains an apparent contradiction between a central orchestrator and a fully decentralized peer-to-peer evaluation setup, making logical consistency load-bearing.
rationale.R1.3: The request to review the section includes checking whether reported metrics and artifacts support claims about generalization, inspectability, and principal empirical contribution.
rationale.R1.5: The section’s narrative arc shifts from framework contribution to benchmark contribution, so section-level organization is centrally implicated.
rationale.R1.6: A generic section review normally includes sentence- and paragraph-level clarity, register, and concision as expected responsibilities.
rationale.RX.1: A reviewer should disclose uncertainty where the artifact alone does not establish experimental details, prior work, or implementation facts.
rationale.RX.2: The section includes broad claims about generalization and scientific advance, requiring overclaim avoidance.
rationale.RX.3: The projection must stay within reviewing the section rather than executing edits, rewriting, or evaluating unrelated parts of the paper.
rationale.RX.4: Review responsibilities include flagging claims or framing that could mislead downstream readers about safety, decentralization, or empirical scope.
rationale.RX.5: Any review observations should be traceable to specific statements in the provided artifact.
